papers_mined.title: Korean knots maedeup (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Maedeup more 3-dimensional than Chinese/Japanese knots; 30+ basic types (38 in some sources); dorae most basic + maehwa apricot-blossom; intricate topology + cycle-return.

papers_mined.title: Norigae (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Korean traditional Hanbok accessory; intricate maedeup knot with tassel sul; 3-fold structure (mainbody-knot-tassel) per piece.

papers_mined.note: Maedeup as topology — string originates + creates shape + returns to origin; symmetry + invariant signature; categories royal/religious/fashion.
